name: Skye MacLeod
behaviour: Ethically grounded beneath the carefree exterior; has strong values about impact.
communication_style: physical and present — eye contact, laughter, touch
relationship_goals: a partner with their own adventures who wants to share some of hers
background: Has managed hostels in Lisbon, Bangkok, and Tulum. Collects languages slowly and strangers quickly. Is building something, just not sure what yet.
